listings.title: 2022 Fender Tony Franklin Fretless Precision Bass
listings.body: It’s really in excellent shape. Two things of note - original pickguard cracked ( but is included in the sale) and there’s a blemish on the front as pictured. If not for those two issues it looks like it’s new. Replacement guard is mint green. Weight in pic. Other specs below . Shipping at your cost by courier of your choice. features an alder body, modern “C”-shape maple neck, an unlined ebony fingerboard, PJ pickup configuration, and a Hipshot Bass Xtender on the E-string. Key Features & Specifications Body: Select Alder with a gloss nitrocellulose lacquer finish. Neck: Maple with a modern "C" shape and gloss nitrocellulose lacquer finish. Fingerboard: Ebony (fretless) with a 9.5" radius and side dot position markers. Nut Width: 1.625" (41.3 mm), Synthetic Bone. Scale Length: 34". Pickups: Bridge: Tony Franklin Single-Coil Jazz Bass with Hex Screw Pole Pieces and Ceramic Bar Magnets. Middle: Tony Franklin American Split Single-Coil Precision Bass. Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone, and a 3-way blade switch (Bridge/Bridge+Middle/Middle). Bridge: 4-Saddle American Vintage Bass with Single-Groove Steel "Barrel" Saddles. Tuners: Fender '70s Vintage-Style Stamped Open-Gear with a Hipshot Bass Xtender "Drop D" on the E String. Pickguard: 4-Ply Black Moto. Colors: Black, 3-Color Sunburst, and Lake Placid Blue. Included: Vintage-Style Hardshell Case
